portfolioSection.whoBehindTitle: We build your platforms as if they were
portfolioSection.whoBehindDescription: Bekasen is a premium digital agency born from the Haitian diaspora. We're not just service providers — we're your technical partners. Every project receives the same passion and rigor as if we were building it for ourselves.
portfolioSection.title: Technical excellence that drives your vision.
portfolioSection.project1Description: Complete medical ERP with patient management, appointments and billing.
portfolioSection.project2Description: Hotel management system with online booking and admin dashboard.
portfolioSection.project3Description: Mobile-first marketplace connecting local sellers and buyers.
portfolioSection.project4Description: Institutional website with immersive animations and visual storytelling.

servicesBento.title: What We Do For
servicesBento.subtitle: Tailored digital solutions to propel your business toward success.
servicesBento.service1Description: An elegant, high-performance website that reflects your brand's excellence. Custom design, smooth animations and SEO optimization.
servicesBento.service2Description: Your complete online store with product management, secure payments and admin dashboard.
servicesBento.service3Description: Intelligent business applications with AI automation, custom workflows and advanced integrations.

processTimeline.title: How it works
processTimeline.subtitle: A proven 4-step process to turn your vision into digital reality.
processTimeline.step1Description: We analyze your needs, market and goals to define a tailored digital strategy.
processTimeline.step2Description: Creating interactive mockups and a premium design that reflects your brand identity.
processTimeline.step3Description: Clean, performant and tested code. Every feature is validated before going to production.
processTimeline.step4Description: Deployment, SEO optimization and performance tracking for continuous growth.

testimonials.title: What our clients say
testimonials.subtitle: Concrete results that speak for themselves.
testimonials.testimonial1Text: Bekasen transformed our online presence. The design is beautiful and our sales increased by 300% in 3 months.
testimonials.testimonial2Text: An exceptional team that truly understands the needs of the Haitian community. The result exceeds all our expectations.
testimonials.testimonial3Text: Professionalism, creativity and results. Bekasen is the ideal digital partner for the Haitian diaspora.

pricingFAQ.title: Payment & Questions
pricingFAQ.subtitle: Everything you need to know before getting started.
pricingFAQ.paymentDescription: We accept several methods for your convenience.
pricingFAQ.contactMessage: Didn't find the answer? We're real people, just like you — ask us anything.
pricingFAQ.faq1Question: How long does it take to create a website?
pricingFAQ.faq1Answer: A premium showcase site is delivered in 1 to 2 weeks. A management application takes 3 to 4 weeks. Custom projects vary depending on complexity.
pricingFAQ.faq2Question: Do you offer support after delivery?
pricingFAQ.faq2Answer: Yes, all our packages include 30 days of free support after delivery. Monthly maintenance plans are also available.
pricingFAQ.faq3Question: Can I edit the content myself?
pricingFAQ.faq3Answer: Absolutely. We integrate an intuitive content management system so you can update your site easily.
pricingFAQ.faq4Question: Do you work with international clients?
pricingFAQ.faq4Answer: Yes, we serve clients worldwide, with a specialization for the Haitian community and diaspora.
pricingFAQ.faq5Question: How does the payment process work?
pricingFAQ.faq5Answer: We require a 50% deposit to start the project, and the remaining 50% upon final delivery.

finalCTA.title: Let's turn your vision into reality
finalCTA.subtitle: Join the businesses that trust Bekasen for their digital transformation.

footer.madeWith: Made with passion for the Haitian community 🇭🇹

chatbot.title: Bekasen Assistant
chatbot.autoReply: Thanks for your message! Our AI assistant is coming soon. In the meantime, feel free to use the quick questions below or contact us directly.
chatbot.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the Bekasen assistant. How can I help you?

services.label: Services
services.question: What services does Bekasen offer?
services.answer: We design and build high-performance websites, custom business applications, and AI-powered solutions — tailored for ambitious companies.

pricing.label: Pricing
pricing.question: How much do your services cost?
pricing.answer: Our projects start from a discovery call. Pricing depends on scope, complexity and timeline. Visit our pricing page or start a project to get a custom quote.

timeline.label: Timeline
timeline.question: How long does a project take?
timeline.answer: A typical website takes 4–8 weeks from kickoff to launch. Complex apps can take 8–16 weeks. We keep you in the loop at every stage.

techStack.label: Tech stack
techStack.question: What technologies do you use?
techStack.answer: We work with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Node.js, PostgreSQL and modern AI frameworks. Always the right tool for the job.

contact.label: Contact
contact.question: How can I reach the team?
contact.answer: You can start a project through our form, or email us directly at hello@bekasen.com. We typically respond within 24 hours.
